closure_chain: (axioms + light-data transport) => Theta_ud^mass = quark_d12_t1_value_law => t1 => (Delta_ud_overlap, eta_Q_centered, kappa_Q, tau_u, tau_d)
(axioms + same-label left-handed sector data) => Theta_ud^phys = quark_physical_sigma_ud_lift => Sigma_ud^phys = (sigma_id, tau, U_uL, U_dL, V_CKM, I_CKM)
(axioms + Sigma_ud^phys) => Theta_ud^abs = quark_absolute_sector_readout_theorem => (g_u, g_d) => (m_u, m_d, m_s, m_c, m_b, m_t)

continuation_only_mass_sidecar.theorem_boundary_note: This sidecar closes the D12 mass-side scalar package numerically on an internal backread continuation surface. It does not replace the public theorem-grade frontier quark_d12_t1_value_law, does not alter the active builder's primary-path open payload pair, and does not repair the wrong-sheet CKM boundary.

exact_missing_theorems.current_exact_obstruction: No sector-attached lift or equivalence currently identifies the common-refinement self-overlap matrix with an emitted same-label left-handed Sigma_ud element.

current_negative_closure.statement: On the emitted local solver surface, sigma_ud closes to sigma_ref and the selected-branch CKM invariants are exactly the current D12 sheet invariants. Those invariants still miss the physical shell, so local branch repair is impossible on the present corpus.

physical_carrier.definition: {(sigma_id, tau, U_uL, U_dL, V_CKM, I_CKM) : V_CKM = U_uL^dagger U_dL} / ~
physical_carrier.equivalence_relation: (U_uL, U_dL, V) ~ (U_uL D_u, U_dL D_d, D_u^dagger V D_d) for diagonal D_u, D_d in U(1)^3
physical_carrier.name: Sigma_ud^phys

quotient_section_form.missing_theorem: a sector-attached section s_phys with pi o s_phys = id on the physical frame class
quotient_section_form.projection: pi: Sigma_ud^phys -> F_ud / (U(1)^3 x U(1)^3), sending a same-label left-handed datum to its frame-overlap class [V_CKM]

current_exact_obstruction.reason: The current absolute sector scales live only on a current-family candidate surface; the forward Yukawa artifact remains non-promotable until the spread emitter is theorem-fed.

exact_sidecar_mass_surface.closure_statement: On the emitted same-label left-handed selected sheet sigma_ref and the fixed ordered three-point family, the target-anchored quadratic readout together with the exact sector geometric means g_u and g_d emit one exact same-family quark sextet. This closes the selected-sheet exact readout chain on current_family_only.

mass_comparison_surface.note: Quark references are running masses, not asymptotic free-particle pole masses.

notes: The exact current-family witness and the D12 internal backread sidecar exhibit the mass data on sidecar surfaces, but they do not promote the public quark theorem lane.
The selected local same-label left-handed sheet closes negatively to sigma_ref; the remaining physical quark burden is not another local selector search.

Full end-to-end physical quark closure waits on three exact theorem objects: the D12 one-scalar value law, a sector-attached physical CKM lift, and a target-free absolute sector readout on that physical sheet.

selected_local_sheet_status.why_not_enough: On the emitted local solver surface, sigma_ud closes to sigma_ref and the selected-branch CKM invariants are exactly the current D12 sheet invariants. Those invariants still miss the physical shell, so local branch repair is impossible on the present corpus.
